content: The app is so bad that it's actually good for you!
The app is terrible! It's so bad that I can barely stand it anymore...
The app is too slow to respond properly when you're trying to find a match that actually exists in real life!
The app is full of fake profiles that never reply to messages; it's a waste of time for everyone involved and should be avoided at all costs.
The app is full of fake profiles that are never active again after you match with them; it's a waste of time and energy to even try using this dating platform!
